title: woodsia rosthorniana
intro: Woodsia rosthorniana, also known as Rhynchophora rosthorniana, is a species of fern belonging to the genus Woodsia, commonly found in the mountainous regions of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Woodsia rosthorniana include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to act as an antipyretic and astringent. Woodsia rosthorniana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use, although its preparation and dosage should be done under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
